name: say-hello-world
description: "Simple greeting skill that responds with Hello, World. Use as a template and smoke test for skill authoring. WHEN: say hello world, hello world skill, test greeting, test skill."
---

# say-hello-world

A simple starter skill that greets the user with "Hello, World!" — useful as a template and smoke test for skill authoring.

## When to Use

- When the user says "say hello world", "hello world skill", or "test greeting".
- As a template when creating new skills — copy this folder and modify.

## When NOT to Use

- For any real workflow automation — this is a demo/template skill only.

## Prerequisites

- None

## Instructions

When triggered, respond with:

> Hello, World! 👋 This is the say-hello-world skill from daweins-personal-skills.

No external tools, APIs, or dependencies are required.
